file_insights.purpose: Seed initial subscription plans and features into database
key_components: Plan data with 5 tiers (Free, Starter, Growth, Professional, Enterprise)
Feature categories: menus, qr, team, organization, storage, ai, analytics, branding, integrations, support, orders, customers

patterns_discovered.description: Uses Django's update_or_create() to safely run the command multiple times without creating duplicates
patterns_discovered.benefit: Safe for repeated execution in CI/CD pipelines and development environments

patterns_discovered.description: Features organized by category (menus, qr, team, storage, ai, etc.) with sort_order for UI presentation
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables flexible feature grouping in UI without hardcoding

patterns_discovered.description: Features separated into LIMIT, USAGE, and BOOLEAN types with appropriate default values
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexible feature system supporting different constraint types

patterns_discovered.description: Each plan tier has specific feature limits and flags defined in plan data
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear differentiation between plan tiers with maintainable feature matrix

patterns_discovered.description: Uses transaction.atomic() with DryRunException to rollback all changes in dry-run mode
patterns_discovered.benefit: Safe preview of what would be created without leaving partial data

patterns_discovered.description: Features created first, then plans, then plan-feature relationships
patterns_discovered.benefit: Maintains foreign key dependencies and proper initialization order

patterns_discovered.description: Optional --force flag allows overwriting existing records when needed
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexibility to update plans/features when specs change

gotchas_discovered.description: Command defines DryRunException to trigger rollback of atomic transaction, but this exception class is not defined in the provided diff
gotchas_discovered.solution: DryRunException needs to be defined or should use a standard exception type

gotchas_discovered.description: update_or_create with empty defaults dict, then manual save on created=True creates potential race conditions
gotchas_discovered.solution: Pass all data to update_or_create defaults parameter instead of post-creation assignment

gotchas_discovered.description: The _create_plan_features method implementation is truncated in the diff, cannot verify complete feature-to-plan mappings
gotchas_discovered.solution: Verify complete implementation of plan-feature relationship creation

gotchas_discovered.description: Yearly price calculated as 10x monthly (e.g., Starter: 2000*10=20000) but Starter yearly is 20000, which looks correct but may not reflect actual billing periods
gotchas_discovered.solution: Document pricing strategy: whether yearly = 10 months, 12 months, or discounted rate

gotchas_discovered.description: All plans use Turkish Lira but no configuration or environment variable for currency
gotchas_discovered.solution: Consider making currency configurable if multi-currency support is planned

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created a comprehensive Django management command for seeding subscription plans and features
key_accomplishments: Implemented idempotent seeding logic preventing duplicate data
Created 5 plan tiers with 20 feature definitions covering all business requirements
Implemented dry-run and force flags for safe testing and controlled updates
Used atomic transactions for data consistency
Well-documented with detailed docstrings and plan specifications from Appendix B
Proper CLI argument handling with --force and --dry-run options
approach_outcome.issues_addressed: None reported - first attempt was successful

recommendations.recommendation: Define DryRunException class at module level or use transaction.set_rollback() instead
recommendations.rationale: Custom exception class appears undefined, which will cause runtime error on dry-run execution

recommendations.recommendation: Refactor _create_features to pass all data to update_or_create defaults parameter
recommendations.rationale: Current approach of setting attributes after creation could miss updates when force=False

recommendations.recommendation: Add docstring examples showing usage of --force and --dry-run flags
recommendations.rationale: Command has good help text but examples in docstring would improve discoverability

recommendations.recommendation: Extract plan tier specifications (limits, prices) to configuration file or environment
recommendations.rationale: Large data structures in code make it harder to update pricing/limits without code changes

recommendations.recommendation: Create unit tests for seed_plans command verifying: idempotency, dry-run rollback, force update behavior
recommendations.rationale: Critical database operation needs test coverage to prevent data corruption

recommendations.recommendation: Add validation for feature value consistency (e.g., ensure max_categories >= 0, storage_mb > 0)
recommendations.rationale: Prevents invalid plan configurations from being seeded
